rationale: No direct conflict. §30.087 governs state funding for deaf education from the foundation school fund and permissive district cooperation. Homestead exemption changes affect local property tax revenue but do not amend or contradict this statute's operative provisions.
quote: The cost of educating students who are deaf or hard of hearing shall be borne by the state and paid from the foundation school fund
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure on school districts' ability to provide voluntary property/services cooperation is speculative; no statutory conflict exists.
